QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_49

question.text: What is the additional deduction available under Section 80CCD(1B) for NPS contribution?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Section 80CCD(1B) provides an additional deduction of Rs.50,000 for NPS Tier I contributions, over and above the Section 80C limit of Rs.1.5 lakh. **The Trap:** This Rs.50,000 is OVER AND ABOVE the Rs.1.5 lakh 80C limit, making total possible NPS tax benefit up to Rs.2 lakh (Rs.1.5L + Rs.50K). **Cross-Exam Context:** 80CCD(1B) is available only under the old tax regime. Under the new tax regime, this deduction is not available. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Highlight the 80CCD(1B) benefit to clients on the old tax regime. It provides Rs.50,000 additional deduction that no other instrument offers.
